South East Water faces £22m fine after customers left unable to shower and flush toiletsThe firm was unable to cope during high demand, Ofwat says, leading to "immense stress" for customers. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3v77yzn5gxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3v77yzn5gxo#2 Thu, 05 Mar 2026 11:00:09 GMT
